name: phonebook-backend
description: Phonebook backend from Full-stack open Part 3
author: Khajan Bisht

scripts.build:ui: rm -rf dist && cd ../full-stack-open/Part-3/phonebook-frontend && npm run build && cp -r dist ../../../phonebook-backend
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:ui && git add . && git commit -m 'ui build' && git push
